title: Section 32
content: (1) The Designated Court may take cognizance of offences under this Act without the accused being committed to it for trial. (2) Save as otherwise provided in section 31, the provisions of the Code of Criminal Procedure, 1973 (2 of 1974) shall apply-- (a) to all arrests, searches and seizures made under this Act; (b) to the proceedings under this Act and for the purposes of the said provisions, the Designated Court shall be deemed to be a Court of Session and the persons conducting the prosecution before the Designated Court, shall be deemed to be Public Prosecutors.
